title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, identifies gaps, and synthesizes them into a unified response. A budget Fusion configuration reportedly approached Fable 5 performance on deep research tasks at roughly half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, a system from OpenRouter that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares the outputs, identifies gaps between them, and synthesizes a unified response. The takeaway is that a budget Fusion configuration reportedly approached Fable 5 performance on deep research tasks at roughly half the cost, an example of ensemble methods and model routing applied to lower the price of high quality output.
